issues.description: First action should place a Stage card at bottom of deck, not search and put on board. Should use 'SearchDeck' with destination 'deck' and 'bottom' placement, or a dedicated 'PlaceDeck' action type.

RevealFromHand is incorrect. Effect requires looking at top 5 cards of YOUR deck (not hand), revealing up to 1 card matching '[Upper Yard] or {Shandian Warrior}' type, and adding to hand. Should be 'SearchDeck' with count:5 and filter for both subtypes.
Filter only includes 'Upper Yard' subtype. Must include OR condition for '{Shandian Warrior}' type cards as well.
thenActions structure is unclear. Effect requires 'place rest at bottom of deck in any order' after revealing 1 card to hand. This reordering step is not properly captured.
Missing 'optional:true' flag. Effect text states 'You may place 1 Stage', indicating this is optional.
